cognitivecomputations/dolphin-mistral-24b-venice-edition:free | Venice | 33K | | ## Free Model Rate Limits 20 Requests / minute 200 Requests / day $0 No credit card needed Limits apply per-model. If you hit rate limits, you can add credits to your OpenRouter account for higher throughput with paid model variants. ## Best Free Models by Use Case Coding Qwen3 Coder 480B Best DeepSeek R1 0528 Llama 3.3 70B Reasoning DeepSeek R1 0528 Best Qwen3 235B Thinking Qwen3 Next 80B Vision & Multimodal Qwen3 VL 235B Thinking Best NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 12B VL Qwen3 VL 30B Thinking General Purpose Llama 3.3 70B Best Mistral Small 3.1 24B Gemma 3 27B ![CostGoat desktop app showing AI agent quotas, usage costs, credit balances, and subscriptions](https://costgoat.com/_next/image?url=%2Fscreenshots%2Fai.webp&w=3840&q=75) ## Track Your LLM API Costs in Real-Time Monitor spending across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and other LLM providers. Track credit balances and get alerts when usage spikes. Privacy-first desktop app. 7-day free trial, no sign-up required. [Try Free for 7 Days](https://costgoat.com/) [Learn more →](https://costgoat.com/) ## Related Resources [OpenRouter Credits Tracking\\ \\ Monitor your credit balance](https://costgoat.com/monitor/openrouter-credits) [Claude API Pricing\\ \\ Direct Anthropic API costs](https://costgoat.com/pricing/claude-api) [DeepSeek API Pricing\\ \\ Direct DeepSeek API costs](https://costgoat.com/pricing/deepseek-api) ## OpenRouter Free Models FAQ Common questions about using free AI models on OpenRouter ### Are OpenRouter free models really free? Yes. OpenRouter offers select models at zero cost — no API key charges, no hidden fees. Free models are subsidized by OpenRouter and have rate limits (typically 20 requests/minute, 200 requests/day). You do need an OpenRouter account and API key, but there's no credit card required. ### What are the rate limits on OpenRouter free models? Free models on OpenRouter typically have a limit of 20 requests per minute and 200 requests per day. If you hit the limit, you'll get a 429 error. These limits reset daily. For higher throughput, you can add credits to your account or use paid model variants. ### What is the best free model on OpenRouter for coding? Qwen3 Coder 480B (free) is currently the strongest free coding model on OpenRouter, with 262K context and state-of-the-art code generation. DeepSeek R1 (free) is also excellent for reasoning-heavy coding tasks. For lighter tasks, Mistral Small 3.1 and Llama 3.3 70B are solid options. ### Can I use OpenRouter free models in production? You can, but it's not recommended for production workloads due to rate limits and potential availability changes. Free models may be removed or have limits adjusted without notice. For production use, add credits to your OpenRouter account and use paid model variants for guaranteed availability. ### How do I use OpenRouter free models? Sign up at openrouter.ai, get your API key, and use any free model ID (ending in :free) with the OpenRouter API. The API is OpenAI-compatible, so you can use it with any OpenAI SDK by changing the base URL to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1. No credits needed for free models. ## Track Your OpenRouter Spending When you outgrow free models, CostGoat tracks your OpenRouter credits in real-time. 7-day free trial, no sign-up required.
